title: spergularia microsperma subsp. fontenellei
intro: Spergularia microsperma subsp. fontenellei, also known as Fontenelle's sand-spurrey, is a species of flowering plant in the family Caryophyllaceae, commonly found in dry, sandy areas. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities, which make it useful in treating wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of Spergularia microsperma subsp. fontenellei include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and soothe irritated skin. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, and topical creams, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized effectively.
